name: opencli-plugin-huawei-jiaxian
description: Huawei's 稼先社区 (jx.huawei.com) — `search` returns the top N most relevant documents (title, type, author, date, views, replies, rich summary, url); `read` fetches one post's full body by postId. Requires a logged-in Huawei session via the OpenCLI Browser Bridge.
